confidenceReason: The merge pipeline configuration was inspected directly.

criteriaResults.rationale: Contract tests and the invariant suite are advisory at merge time.
Lint blocks merges and the other sensors run visibly.

ratingDrivers.description: Contract tests and the invariant suite run at merge time but cannot block a merge.

rationale: The strongest sensors run on every merge but cannot block one, so standards hold by convention rather than gate — minimum, not target.
